welcome.body: Your server is up and running, but no administrator exists yet. Let’s create the first admin account and lock it down with two-factor authentication.

welcome.localBody: Everything is stored on this server only.
welcome.secureBody: Passkey or authenticator app — pick one as the second factor.

changePassword.currentPasswordHint: Enter your existing password to verify your identity.
changePassword.pageSubtitle: After changing your password, you will be signed out and need to log in again with the new password.

login.usernameRequiredForPasskey: Enter your username to continue with a passkey.

mfa.recoverySubtitle: Your last resort if you lose your authenticator.

register.mfaOptionalNotice: You can add two-factor authentication next — it’s optional, and you can do it later in settings.
register.passkeyDescription: No password to remember. Your passkey stays on this device and can’t be phished.
register.passkeyHeadline: Sign in with your face or fingerprint
register.passkeyStepSubtitle: Passkeys are the fastest, safest way in. We recommend adding one now.
register.passwordHint: 10-72 characters with at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number.
register.recoverySavedConfirm: I’ve saved my recovery codes somewhere safe
register.recoverySubtitle: Your last resort if you lose every other factor.
register.skipPasskey: Skip for now, use authenticator only
register.subtitle: Create your username and password first, then secure the account.

register.totpSubtitle: Required — scan the code with your authenticator app.

cloud.confirmDisable: Disable {{name}}? Existing imports stay in Lumilio.

cloud.providerDescription: Choose the cloud provider to connect. More providers can be added here later.

cloud.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your Apple devices for {{name}}.

serverSettings.healthCheckDescription: Control how often the app pings the server for health status. Lower values update more frequently but may increase network usage.
serverSettings.workingRepositoryDescription: Choose the default repository scope for repository-aware pages and actions. Select All repositories to keep global views.
